top3.sql:
SELECT drivers.nationality
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId
WHERE results.raceId = 933
  AND results.fastestLapSpeed = (
    SELECT MAX(fastestLapSpeed)
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = 933
  );
